summary: The diff implements a comprehensive agricultural marketing website for 'Adarshpatel Marketing' covering all 8 requirements. The implementation includes a branded homepage, product sections for dairy feed, agri inputs, and coffee trading, a contact/enquiry form wired to a Motoko backend canister, earthy visual theme, sticky navbar, and image references from the correct asset directory. All major requirements appear to be addressed with high fidelity.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity / authentication integration (useInternetIdentity hook, InternetIdentityProvider, AuthClient, login/clear/identity functions)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'No user authentication or login' as a non-goal. The diff includes a full Internet Identity provider and hooks that enable authentication, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: getAllEnquiries and getEnquiry query functions exposed on the backend canister
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only required storing enquiries in the backend (REQ-5). Exposing retrieval endpoints was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer attribution link with caffeine.ai UTM tracking
hallucinated_features.reason: No footer attribution or external branding was requested in the build request.

hallucinated_features.description: 'General Enquiry' option added to the Product of Interest dropdown
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-5 specifies the dropdown should contain exactly three options: Dairy Feed, Agri Inputs, Coffee Trading. A 'General' option was added beyond the specification.
